title: A new bookshop
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: A new bookshop opened near our school last month, and I have already visited it several times. The shop is smaller (27) the large bookshops in the city centre, but it has a very friendly atmosphere. The owner recommended several novels written (28) young authors, and I bought one of them last week. There is also a quiet reading area where customers can sit (29) comfortable chairs and look through books before buying them. Last Friday, the shop organised a talk by a local writer who spoke about his latest novel. I was amazed (30) how clearly he explained the process of writing stories. At the end, people waited patiently to ask questions and get their books signed. I think places like this are important (31) encouraging teenagers to read more often. I am already looking forward (32) visiting the shop again soon.
